subcodes.title: Letter to Khal-i-Akbar from Masqat II
subcodes.first_line: Read thou the Book wherein is remembered the Name of thy Lord, Who sendeth down unto thee now a manifest Book. Give thanks unto God, thy Lord, and prostrate thyself [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. اقرء کتاب ذکر اسم ربک الذی ینزل الان الیک کتابا مبینا ان اشکر الله ربک ثم اسجد
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @transcendence; unknowability of God
